name: MA1 PLUS
subtitle: The Ultimate Sideloading Experience.
description: A premium, hand-curated AltStore repository offering the latest emulators, tweaked media clients, and essential iOS utilities, updated regularly for the best sideloading experience.

apps.name: uYouEnhanced
apps.subtitle: YouTube with uYou & Extra Tweaks
apps.localizedDescription:
YouTube enhanced with the uYou tweak and additional community modifications.

• Complete ad blocking for video, banner, and native ads
• Background playback and Picture-in-Picture mode
• Video and audio downloading in multiple formats
• SponsorBlock integration to auto-skip sponsors
• Return YouTube Dislike counter
• OLED dark mode and interface customization
• Playback speed controls and age restriction bypass
• Notifications Tab restoration
• Backup and restore settings across installs

Note: This is a DIY build — compile from source using the wiki instructions.

versions.localizedDescription:
• Updated to YouTube v20.44.2
• Updated uYou to v3.0.4
• Notifications Tab restoration
• Backup & Restore settings feature
• Various stability improvements

apps.name: BHTwitter
apps.subtitle: Twitter/X with Advanced Enhancements
apps.localizedDescription:
Twitter/X enhanced with BHTwitter tweak providing powerful features:

• Download videos, GIFs, and images natively
• Undo tweets before they go live
• Custom font selection and sizing
• Reader mode for long threads
• Hide promoted tweets and trends
• Force chronological timeline
• Custom app icons and themes
• Enhanced media viewer

Developed by BandarHL with a focus on customization.

versions.localizedDescription:
• Updated to latest Twitter/X SDK
• Fixed video and GIF downloads
• Added new customization options
• Bug fixes and stability improvements

apps.name: BHTikTok
apps.subtitle: TikTok with Enhanced Features
apps.localizedDescription:
TikTok enhanced with BHTikTok tweak by the same developer as BHTwitter:

• Download videos without watermark
• Remove ads from feed and between videos
• Disable region restrictions
• Save live photos and profile pictures
• Copy video descriptions and captions
• Enhanced privacy controls
• Disable read receipts for DMs
• Interface customization options

Developed by BandarHL.

versions.localizedDescription:
• Initial release with TikTok 30.3.0 base
• Video download without watermark
• Ad removal
• Privacy enhancements

apps.name: Nicegram
apps.subtitle: Enhanced Telegram Client
apps.localizedDescription:
Nicegram is a feature-rich Telegram client with additional capabilities:

• Unlock restricted chats and channels
• Multiple account support with quick switching
• Built-in translator for messages
• Custom folders and chat organization
• Enhanced privacy settings
• Read messages without sending read receipts
• Custom themes and appearance options
• Quick reply and scheduling
• Cloud-based message sync
• Pin unlimited chats

Open-source and regularly updated.

versions.localizedDescription: Build of Nicegram for iOS 2.5.5 (702)

apps.name: Delta
apps.subtitle: All-in-One Classic Game Emulator
apps.localizedDescription:
Delta is the premier all-in-one classic video game emulator for iOS:

• Supported Systems: NES, SNES, N64, GB, GBC, GBA, DS, Sega Genesis/Mega Drive
• Save states with screenshot previews
• Fast forward and slow motion
• Cheat code support (Game Genie, Action Replay, GameShark)
• Hold button for rapid fire
• Custom controller skins
• MFi and Bluetooth controller support
• Dropbox, Google Drive, and iCloud sync
• Local multiplayer via controller support

Created by Riley Testut and the AltStore team.

versions.localizedDescription:
Delta 1.6 brings major improvements:
• Added Sega Genesis / Mega Drive support
• New touch controller skins for Genesis
• Improved N64 rendering
• DS microphone support
• Better save state management
• Performance optimizations

apps.name: Provenance
apps.subtitle: Multi-System Retro Game Frontend
apps.localizedDescription:
Provenance is a massive multi-emulator frontend supporting dozens of classic systems:

• Atari 2600, 5200, 7800, Jaguar, Lynx
• NEC TurboGrafx-16 / PC Engine, SuperGrafx
• Nintendo NES, SNES, N64, GB, GBC, GBA, DS, Virtual Boy
• Sega Master System, Genesis, CD, 32X, Game Gear, Saturn
• SNK Neo Geo Pocket Color
• Sony PlayStation 1
• iCloud save sync
• Video filters and shaders
• Automatic cover art matching

Open-source and community-driven.

versions.localizedDescription:
• iCloud Sync for saves and states
• New tvOS UI overhaul
• Video filters support
• Improved Saturn emulation
• Better controller mapping
• Bug fixes and performance improvements

apps.name: PPSSPP
apps.subtitle: PlayStation Portable Emulator
apps.localizedDescription:
PPSSPP is the leading open-source PSP emulator with near-perfect compatibility:

• HD rendering up to 10x native resolution
• Vulkan and OpenGL ES rendering backends
• Save states and fast forward
• Texture upscaling and filtering
• Post-processing shader effects
• MFi and Bluetooth controller support
• Customizable on-screen touch controls
• Network ad-hoc multiplayer
• ISO and CSO format support
• Per-game settings profiles

Created by Henrik Rydgard (hrydgard).

versions.localizedDescription:
• Vulkan rendering improvements
• Fixed compatibility with 20+ titles
• Better touch control customization
• Improved texture cache management
• Performance optimizations for Apple Silicon

apps.name: UTM
apps.subtitle: Full System Emulator & Virtual Machine
apps.localizedDescription:
UTM is a full-featured system emulator and virtual machine host powered by QEMU:

• Run Windows, Linux, macOS, and other operating systems
• QEMU v10.0.2 backend
• VGA, console, and serial display modes
• USB device passthrough (TrollStore)
• Shared directories between host and guest
• Snapshot and save/restore VM states
• Clipboard sharing with guest OS
• App Intents for Shortcuts automation
• Custom keyboard shortcuts for VMs
• Liquid Glass design on iOS 26

Developed by osy as an open-source project.

versions.localizedDescription:
• Updated to QEMU v10.0.2
• Liquid Glass design on iOS 26
• App Intents for Shortcuts automation
• Custom keyboard shortcuts for VMs
• Improved wizard for easier VM creation
• RISC-V64 and classic Mac OS support
• Bug fixes and stability improvements

apps.name: UTM SE
apps.subtitle: Virtual Machine (No JIT Required)
apps.localizedDescription:
UTM SE is the sideload-friendly version of UTM that does not require JIT:

• No JIT activation needed — works out of the box with AltStore
• Run Windows, Linux, and other operating systems
• QEMU v10.0.2 backend with threaded TCG
• Slower than full UTM but more compatible with sideloading
• All core features: snapshots, shared directories, USB
• Perfect for users without TrollStore

Developed by osy.

versions.localizedDescription:
• No JIT required — sideload-friendly
• QEMU v10.0.2 backend
• All core UTM features
• Bug fixes and stability improvements

apps.name: Feather
apps.subtitle: On-Device IPA Installer & Manager
apps.localizedDescription:
Feather is a modern, SwiftUI-based on-device IPA installer and app manager:

• Sign and install IPA files directly on device
• Import certificates and provisioning profiles
• Built-in IPA file browser
• Certificate management with expiry tracking
• Modify bundle identifiers before install
• Clean, native iOS design
• URL scheme import support
• App icon customization
• Lightweight and fast

Open-source project by claration (formerly khcrysalis).

versions.localizedDescription:
• Bug fixes and stability improvements
• Updated signing engine
• Improved certificate handling
• UI polish

apps.name: SideStore
apps.subtitle: Sideload Apps Without a Computer
apps.localizedDescription:
SideStore is a community-driven fork of AltStore that enables wireless sideloading:

• Sideload apps without a computer after initial setup
• Automatic app refresh over WiFi
• WireGuard VPN-based pairing (no tethered connection)
• AltStore source compatibility
• JIT support for emulators
• Built-in source browser
• Multiple source support
• Open-source and community maintained

The next evolution of iOS sideloading.

versions.localizedDescription:
• Stability improvements
• Fixed wireless refresh issues
• Better source handling
• Bug fixes

apps.name: LiveContainer
apps.subtitle: Run Apps Without Sideload Limits
apps.localizedDescription:
LiveContainer allows you to run multiple sideloaded apps within a single container:

• Bypass the 3-app sideloading limit
• Run unlimited apps from one container
• No need to re-sign individual apps
• JIT activation support for emulators
• App data isolation between contained apps
• Import IPA files directly on-device
• Lightweight with minimal overhead
• Quick app switching
• App data backup and restore

Open-source project by khanhduytran0.

versions.localizedDescription:
• Expanded app compatibility
• Improved JIT activation
• Fixed crash on launch for specific apps
• Better memory management
• App data backup/restore

apps.name: Cowabunga
apps.subtitle: iOS Customization Toolbox
apps.localizedDescription:
Cowabunga is a comprehensive iOS customization tool using MacDirtyCow and other exploits:

• Custom status bar icons and carrier text
• Lock screen and home screen modifications
• Custom system themes and icon theming
• Modify Control Center modules
• Change system fonts
• Custom dock and folder appearance
• Springboard layout customization
• Passcode key customization
• Disable OTA update badge
• Export and import theme configs

Created by lemin (leminlimez).

versions.localizedDescription:
• Bug fixes and stability improvements
• New pre-made themes
• Improved status bar customization
• Better theme import/export

apps.name: TrollInstallerX
apps.subtitle: TrollStore Installer for iOS 14-16.6.1
apps.localizedDescription:
TrollInstallerX is the universal TrollStore installer supporting a wide range of iOS versions:

• Install TrollStore on iOS 14.0 to 16.6.1
• Automatic exploit selection for your device
• One-tap installation process
• Supports all device types (iPhone, iPad, iPod)
• No jailbreak required
• Persistence through reboots
• Enables perma-signed app installation

Developed by alfiecg24 for the TrollStore community.

versions.localizedDescription:
• Improved exploit reliability
• Better device compatibility
• Fixed installation on certain iOS 16 versions
• Stability improvements

news.title: Welcome to MA1 PLUS
news.caption: The ultimate premium sideloading repository — 30+ curated apps covering tweaked social media, emulators, and iOS utilities. All free, forever.

news.title: UTM 4.7.5 — QEMU 10 & Liquid Glass
news.caption: UTM updated to QEMU v10.0.2 with Liquid Glass design on iOS 26, App Intents, and custom keyboard shortcuts.

news.title: PPSSPP 1.20.4 Released
news.caption: PPSSPP receives major update with improved Vulkan rendering, 20+ title fixes, and Apple Silicon optimizations.

news.title: Provenance 3.3.0 — iCloud Sync
news.caption: Provenance now supports iCloud save sync, video filters, and an overhauled tvOS interface.

news.title: SideStore 0.6.3 Available
news.caption: SideStore receives stability and wireless refresh improvements. Sideload apps without a computer.

news.title: LiveContainer 3.7.2 — Bypass Sideload Limits
news.caption: Run unlimited sideloaded apps from a single container. LiveContainer 3.7.2 brings expanded compatibility and JIT improvements.

news.title: Feather v2.8.2 — Modern IPA Installer
news.caption: Sign and install IPAs on-device with Feather. Updated signing engine and certificate handling.

news.title: 30+ Apps & Growing
news.caption: MA1 PLUS now features over 30 hand-curated applications across emulators, tweaked social media, ad-free streaming, and system utilities.
